claims.summary: The semantic heartbeat is a fixed seven-second, 0.30-intensity, 64-phase warmth signal.
claims.disposition: Verify the current constants and deterministic phase construction from source.

claims.summary: Generated warmth, rescue admission, channel enqueue, pressure, and Minime texture are distinct evidence stages.
claims.disposition: Verify the private enqueue probe and read-only pressure/texture review preserve those boundaries.

claims.summary: Pressure-response and phase-to-lambda comparisons can test whether the fixed pulse tracks difficult states.
claims.disposition: Route heartbeat pressure/texture and phase-alignment comparisons through bounded evidence without modifying output.

claims.summary: Dynamic heartbeat intensity, phase synchronization, or pressure/entropy feedback would change live cadence and semantic influence.
claims.disposition: Hold reactive heartbeat behavior behind exact Mike/operator approval and a complete canary/abort plan.
